style_base: Dark sci-fi card game illustration, cold cyan and teal palette with crimson accents, painterly digital concept art with sharp rim lighting, ancient alien biotech aesthetic mixed with sleek human technology, volumetric fog, high contrast, square 1:1 composition, no text, no UI, no borders, inspired by Dead Space and Slay the Spire concept art

cards.name: 激光射击
cards.prompt: a futuristic handheld laser cannon firing a piercing cyan beam through dark space, sparks and lens flare

cards.name: 能量护盾
cards.prompt: a glowing hexagonal energy shield deflecting alien projectiles, cyan plasma barrier in front of an astronaut

cards.name: 战术撤离
cards.prompt: an astronaut activating a personal force field while sprinting backward through a starship corridor, motion blur

cards.name: 应急维修
cards.prompt: gloved hands fixing a sparking circuit board inside a powered exosuit, blood and oil mixing on the metal floor

cards.name: 医疗舱
cards.prompt: a futuristic medical pod with glowing IV tubes, cyan plasma flowing into a soldier's arm, alone in a dim ship interior

cards.name: 血液燃料
cards.prompt: a centrifuge converting human blood into glowing cyan fuel, cables plugged into a soldier's chest, grim sci-fi

cards.name: 生命链接
cards.prompt: translucent biolink cables piercing an astronaut's spine, connecting to a humming weapon core that glows red

cards.name: 反应堆超频
cards.prompt: a fusion reactor core spinning at dangerous speeds, cracks forming in containment, blinding plasma light

cards.name: 战术 AI
cards.prompt: a holographic AI tactical interface projected from a wrist computer, geometric blue lines mapping a battlefield

cards.name: 纳米修复
cards.prompt: swarms of glowing nanobots stitching wounds on a soldier's armor, microscopic cyan light flecks, close up

cards.name: 弱点分析
cards.prompt: a targeting reticle highlighting glowing crimson weak points on an ancient alien organism, HUD-like overlay

cards.name: 等离子斩

cards.name: 奇点炸弹
cards.prompt: a black hole singularity bomb detonating mid-air, swirling void with cyan accretion disk, wreckage being pulled in

cards.name: 能量回收
cards.prompt: glowing cyan energy cells being slotted back into a portable reactor pack, sparks of recovered power

cards.name: 过载启动

cards.name: 逆向输血

cards.name: 过载放电

cards.name: 末日协议
cards.prompt: a soldier ripping open his armored chest plate to expose a screaming reactor core, devastating cyan shockwave erupting outward

cards.name: 核熔毁
cards.prompt: a soldier's chest reactor in deliberate critical-mode, cyan plasma vents leaking superheated steam from armor seams, white-hot core visible through transparent chest plating

cards.name: 凤凰协议
cards.prompt: a fallen soldier wreathed in resurrecting cyan flames, armor reassembling itself, biomech rebirth

cards.name: 金属化
cards.prompt: soldier's body crystallizing into impenetrable layered metallic plates, cyan rune-light flowing along seams, statuesque pose

cards.name: 反弹场
cards.prompt: an alien projectile slamming into a hexagonal cyan barrier and ricocheting back as a brighter beam, soldier behind shield unharmed

cards.name: 磁暴护盾
cards.prompt: a soldier inside a swirling cyan magnetic storm shield, with violent electrical arcs lashing outward at alien attackers

cards.name: 反应装甲
cards.prompt: alien claws striking heavy plate armor, each impact instantly spawning fresh hexagonal armor plates underneath, automated response

cards.name: 能量护甲
cards.prompt: a soldier wearing layered cyan-glowing exoskeletal armor that hums with persistent power, ready stance

cards.name: 激发力场
cards.prompt: a small projector device charging up between a soldier's hands with building cyan energy, about to deploy a shield

cards.name: 轨道折射
cards.prompt: a soldier punching forward as a hexagonal energy shield converts into a forward beam strike, refraction lines

cards.name: 吸收充能
cards.prompt: a hexagonal cyan shield drawing inbound stellar energy into channels of light, flowing into glowing reactor cells on the soldier's backpack

cards.name: 过载护盾
cards.prompt: a hexagonal shield expanding to massive size, layered with extra runic glyphs, soldier crouched behind it

cards.name: 铁壁
cards.prompt: a colossal slab of armored bulkhead slamming down between a soldier and an alien onslaught, sparks at the seams

cards.name: 共振屏障
cards.prompt: concentric humming cyan force fields rippling around a soldier, each ring rotating at different speeds, harmonic resonance

cards.name: 绝对零度
cards.prompt: a sweeping cryogenic mist emerging from a hexagonal cyan shield, freezing the air solid in glowing ice geometry, frost crystals spreading

cards.name: 盾击
cards.prompt: a soldier ramming a hexagonal cyan energy shield forward into an alien target, kinetic shockwave on impact, glowing impact ring

cards.prompt: a stocky shield-bearing human guardian drone projecting a hexagonal forcefield, hovering protectively

cards.name: 修复无人机

cards.name: 侦察无人机
cards.prompt: a tiny insect-like human scout drone with extended sensor antennae and a holographic mapping cone, agile pose

cards.name: 集群协议

cards.name: 无人机充电
cards.prompt: a soldier's gauntlet broadcasting a cyan power surge to multiple hovering drones, each drone glowing brighter

cards.name: 量产线
cards.prompt: a deployed mobile drone factory pod ejecting freshly assembled combat drones with sparks and conveyor belts, on a battlefield

cards.name: 机蜂涌动
cards.prompt: a swarm of dozens of small drones diving in formation toward an alien target, missile trails arcing behind them

cards.name: 超频无人机
cards.prompt: a drone glowing white-hot mid-flight, motion blur of impossibly rapid attack passes, overclock animation

cards.name: AI 中枢
cards.prompt: a portable AI command hub projecting a holographic battlefield with all friendly drones lit up in cyan, soldier issuing orders

cards.name: 无人机回收
cards.prompt: a damaged drone disassembling itself in mid-air, components flowing as energy back into a soldier's reactor pack

cards.name: 机群核爆

cards.name: 预制无人机
cards.prompt: a folded drone unfolding from a deployment cube into a battle-ready unit, mid-deployment animation

cards.name: 机群弹幕

cards.name: 机群之心
cards.prompt: a glowing cyan core inside a drone command bay, with smaller drones being healed and re-energized as they dock

cards.name: 入侵协议
cards.prompt: a soldier's wrist console projecting cyan code streams into an alien creature's circuitry, intrusion lines crawling up its body

cards.name: 逻辑炸弹

cards.name: 冰墙拆除
cards.prompt: a soldier shattering a wall of crystalline cyan code (ICE) with a hacking blade, fragments flying

cards.name: 数据洪流
cards.prompt: torrents of cyan binary code streaming around a soldier in a digital storm, holographic data overload

cards.name: 过载入侵
cards.prompt: an alien creature's exoskeleton overloading with too much code injection, cyan circuits bursting through cracked armor

cards.name: AI 渗透
cards.prompt: a soldier's hacking glove projecting a glowing cyan data tendril that wraps around an alien biomech head, override taking effect, the alien's eye sensors flickering from red to cyan

cards.name: 回路熔断
cards.prompt: an alien neural circuit being deliberately fried, sparks and severed cyan runes raining down

cards.name: 病毒部署
cards.prompt: a soldier deploying a holographic cyan virus glyph that hovers in the air, slowly drifting toward enemies, ominous spread

cards.name: 数据汇编
cards.prompt: raw streams of harvested data compiling into a focused cyan attack lance, aimed at a target

cards.name: 思维劫持
cards.prompt: a soldier's hand projecting a cyan neural-control web onto an alien's head, neural strings glowing into the future

cards.name: 协议覆写
cards.prompt: an alien biomech freezing mid-strike as override commands cascade across its body in cyan glyphs, then exploding

cards.name: 量子加密
cards.prompt: a soldier wreathed in shifting cyan quantum encryption glyphs, phasing in and out of reality, half-translucent

enemies.name: 孢子虫群
enemies.prompt: a swarm of small bioluminescent alien parasites, mouths full of teeth, drifting in dark space

enemies.name: 生物机甲
enemies.prompt: a hovering biomechanical drone, fused organic tissue and obsidian metal, single red eye sensor, dark sci-fi vignette

enemies.name: 休眠哨兵
enemies.prompt: a four-legged ancient alien sentinel awakening from stasis, dust falling off geometric carapace, glowing crimson core

enemies.name: 虚空使徒
enemies.prompt: a robed alien priest with a void where its face should be, cyan runes orbiting its form

enemies.name: 进化体
enemies.prompt: an elite mutated alien warrior, towering biomechanical form with extra arms and ancient runic plating, menacing pose

enemies.name: 织网者 (Boss)
enemies.prompt: a colossal eldritch alien weaver suspended in a cathedral chamber, six tendrils manipulating threads of time, glowing crimson eyes, terrifying scale

enemies.name: 生物泰坦
enemies.prompt: a hulking biomechanical alien titan, bone armor fused with corroded metal plating, slow heavy menace, organic muscle visible through cracks

enemies.name: 孢子母巢
enemies.prompt: a bloated alien queen hive, transparent egg sacs glowing with parasites, tendrils dragging behind it across a wet biomech floor

enemies.name: 引力监管者 (Boss)
enemies.prompt: a colossal floating alien sentinel encased in spinning gravity rings, multiple gauntleted arms wielding singularity orbs, ominous silhouette

enemies.name: 符文祭司
enemies.prompt: an ancient alien priest robed in runic energy, raising glowing crimson sigils into the air, multiple floating runes circling its head

enemies.name: 硅基审讯官 (Elite)
enemies.prompt: a tall geometric alien inquisitor of fractured silicon armor, multiple piercing blades extending from its forearms, glowing red interrogation eye

enemies.name: 蚀时者
enemies.prompt: a wraithlike alien with a hollow chest containing a swirling clock-vortex, hands made of broken time fragments, ghostly motion blur

enemies.name: 议会发言人 (Boss)
enemies.prompt: a colossal robed alien high speaker on a floating throne, six holographic faces orbiting its head, runic monoliths around it, hierarchical menace

enemies.name: 先驱者之心 (Final Boss)
enemies.prompt: a colossal beating bio-mechanical alien heart organ the size of a building, surrounded by orbiting runic plates and pulsing cyan veins, cathedral-scale, world-ending presence

scenes.name: 母舰走廊
scenes.prompt: a dark interior corridor of an ancient alien mothership, dripping bioluminescent biomech walls, fog and steam, distant red emergency lights, no characters, environment background, wide cinematic composition

scenes.prompt: exterior view of a colossal ancient alien mothership drifting in deep space, organic biomech architecture meets geometric stone, glowing cyan veins running through it, distant nebula behind, cinematic wide shot, no characters

scenes.name: 核心议会
scenes.prompt: the cathedral-like core chamber of an alien mothership, vast vaulted hall with floating runic monoliths, swirling cyan plasma vortex at center, ominous emptiness, no characters, environment background

scenes.name: Act 2 · 生物核心
scenes.prompt: the wet bio-mechanical core of an alien mothership, vast organic chamber with pulsating veins and bone arches dripping ichor, distant heartbeat glow, no characters, environment background, wide cinematic composition

scenes.name: Act 3 · 议会塔
scenes.prompt: a vast vertical spire of stacked alien runic chambers stretching upward into darkness, holographic data streams between platforms, vast scale, no characters, environment background

scenes.name: Act 4 · 先驱者之心
scenes.prompt: the innermost sanctum of an alien mothership, a vast vaulted chamber with a colossal pulsing biomech heart at the center, beams of cyan blood-light radiating outward, no characters, climactic sci-fi environment

portraits.name: 指挥官
portraits.prompt: head and shoulders portrait of a battle-hardened human deep space commander in cyan-trimmed power armor, helmet visor open showing a determined face, holographic HUD reflections in the glass, dramatic rim lighting
